description: WebAssembly.Module / WebAssembly.compile path went through GetBufferSource which did not correctly handle SharedArrayBuffer + externref combinations, producing a stale pointer in the decoder. When the decode path then walked into a moved-away module bytes buffer, the next allocation crashed in DecodeModuleEnvironment. Fix: refactor GetBufferSource so each call materialises a fresh shared/non-shared view, plus call-site updates (git c89c1e356e68 r=yury, Phabricator D264478, 119-line WasmJS.cpp refactor).
